name: langfuse
description: Query Langfuse traces and observations and create scores for LLM observability and evals

envVars.name: LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY
envVars.description: Langfuse project public key (starts with pk-lf-), used as the HTTP Basic username

envVars.name: LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY
envVars.description: Langfuse project secret key (starts with sk-lf-), used as the HTTP Basic password

tools.name: List Traces
tools.description: List traces in the Langfuse project with optional filters

host.description: Langfuse host: cloud.langfuse.com (EU), us.cloud.langfuse.com (US), or your self-hosted domain

userId.description: Only return traces for this user ID

name.description: Only return traces with this name

sessionId.description: Only return traces in this session

fromTimestamp.description: Only traces on or after this ISO 8601 timestamp, e.g. 2026-06-01T00:00:00Z

toTimestamp.description: Only traces before this ISO 8601 timestamp

tags.description: Only return traces with this tag

historicalSummary.omitted: trace input/output payloads, costs, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Trace
tools.description: Get a single trace with its full observation tree and scores

host.description: Langfuse host: cloud.langfuse.com (EU), us.cloud.langfuse.com (US), or your self-hosted domain

tools.name: List Observations
tools.description: List observations (spans, generations, events) with optional filters

host.description: Langfuse host: cloud.langfuse.com (EU), us.cloud.langfuse.com (US), or your self-hosted domain

traceId.description: Only return observations belonging to this trace

type.description: Observation type: SPAN, GENERATION, or EVENT

name.description: Only return observations with this name

userId.description: Only return observations for this user ID

tools.name: Create Score
tools.description: Attach a score (evaluation result) to a trace or observation

host.description: Langfuse host: cloud.langfuse.com (EU), us.cloud.langfuse.com (US), or your self-hosted domain

name.description: Score name, e.g. accuracy or user-feedback

value.description: Score value (numeric; for BOOLEAN data type use 1 or 0)

observationId.description: Score a specific observation within the trace instead of the whole trace

dataType.description: Score data type: NUMERIC, BOOLEAN, or CATEGORICAL

prompts.title: Review recent traces
prompts.prompt: List my most recent Langfuse traces and summarize latency, errors, and usage patterns.

prompts.title: Score a trace
prompts.prompt: Look up a Langfuse trace I specify and attach an accuracy score with a short comment.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Langfuse API Setup

steps.title: Create a Langfuse account
steps.description: Sign up at https://cloud.langfuse.com (EU) or https://us.cloud.langfuse.com (US) — the free Hobby plan is enough for testing. Self-hosting is also supported.

steps.title: Create project API keys
steps.description: In your Langfuse project, open Settings → API Keys and create a key pair. You get a public key (pk-lf-...) and a secret key (sk-lf-...).

steps.title: Store the keys
steps.description: Add LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY=pk-lf-... and LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY=sk-lf-... to your .env file. The API uses HTTP Basic auth with the public key as username and secret key as password.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Traces tool. If your project is in the US region, pass host us.cloud.langfuse.com; EU projects use the default cloud.langfuse.com.

notes: API keys are project-scoped — create separate keys per project/environment
All tools take a 'host' parameter (default cloud.langfuse.com for EU); US cloud is us.cloud.langfuse.com and self-hosted deployments use their own domain
